title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services family as a Curriculum Developer in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services:
TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services!
